/usr/bin/ar qc libeuxis-gateway-cpp.a "CMakeFiles/euxis-gateway-cpp.dir/src/config.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-gateway-cpp.dir/src/state.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-gateway-cpp.dir/src/auth.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-gateway-cpp.dir/src/server.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-gateway-cpp.dir/src/routes_health.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-gateway-cpp.dir/src/routes_sessions.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-gateway-cpp.dir/src/routes_webhooks.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-gateway-cpp.dir/src/routes_admin.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-gateway-cpp.dir/src/mcp.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-gateway-cpp.dir/src/routes_mcp.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-gateway-cpp.dir/src/websocket.cpp.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libeuxis-gateway-cpp.a
